---
title: "Bite force in insectivorous birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/bite_force.jpg"
description: "We measure bite strength in insect-eating birds to test how feeding performance relates to diet specialization and morphology—work that also launched the lab’s development of new technologies for assessing individual performance in the wild."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project"]
contributors: "BCL"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
